texto: Before parents accept the wisdeom of a school board to cut school librarians, they should ask: Will my child graduate with a 21st-century resume, or a 19th-century transcript? . . . As the information landscape becomes ever more complex, why does a school district want to abandon its professional guides to it?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark Moran que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Before parents accept the wisdeom of a school board to cut school librarians, they should ask: Wi…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, libraries, school, com foco em reflexao.
